creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
I've been meaning to do this provide this patch and take ownership, but you beat me too it! Nice!

Can I just ask that the perl5 dependency be removed from this patch?

As confirmed with lead developer Raphael Manfredi, perl is not required to either build or run gtk-gnutella. There are/were some perl scripts within the distribution, but these are for internal developer testing only.

Cheers, Jamie
